tool_args.label: Penn Station East End Gateway opened January 2021

payload.claim_text: Penn Station's long-awaited renovation project was completed and opened in early January. The most notable additions include the sprawling Moynihan Train Hall and a remarkable high-capacity subway entrance - East End Gateway.
payload.description: New subway entrance at Penn Station opened January 2021

payload.claim_text: The first significant snowstorm of 2021 started on the evening on January 31st and dropped over 17 inches of snow before ending on February 2nd. Thousands of subway employees worked throughout the storm to clear snow from platforms and station stairways, as well as from track, switches, and other equipment critical for service.
payload.subject: January-February 2021 snowstorm

tool_args.label: Bus snowstorm preparedness Winter Storm Orlena

payload.claim_text: The team chained 3,000 local 40-foot buses, deployed 35 snow fighters on predetermined routes in highly-trafficked areas, and strategically placed 60 road and tow trucks throughout the City.
payload.subject: Winter Storm Orlena - Bus preparedness
